        @Nonnull
public java.io.File file()

      • url

        public java.net.URL url()
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from class: RuleSource
        Provides an URL to the location the RuleSource is read from. This is more general than returning a file (works also e.g. in case of jar files where the file would be "jar:file:///...").
        Specified by:
        url in class RuleSource
        Returns:
        the location of the RuleSource as url
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - on I/O errors
